docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GALINDO, SALVADOR AS TO DEFENDANT CIXIAN, CHEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-25-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/7/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
REMARK: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL RETURNED. SENT TO: PLAINTIFF - SALVADOR GALINDO; (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 78.99 SERVED JUL-19-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CIXIAN, CHEN
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL. NO APPEARANCES (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO THE ORDER SIGNED ON 12/07/2021 BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG.
